TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mamnoon_Hussain, title = Mamnoon_Hussain, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mamnoon_Hussain} }

S.FORM: Mamnoon Hussain ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 12, Mamnoon Hussain, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Pakistan ta' misuw hya' ga Mamnoon Hussain, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Mamnoon Hussain ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 12, Mamnoon Hussain, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Pakistan ta' misuw hya' ga Mamnoon Hussain, aring ryax tay 9 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2013 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mamnoon ħus~ɕs~ɕain rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, mamnoon ħus~ɕs~ɕain, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw pakis~ɕtan taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mamnoon ħus~ɕs~ɕain, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
